# daytona_sandbox_toolbox_proxy_url (Data Source)

Reads the toolbox proxy URL for a Daytona sandbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_toolbox_proxy_url" "example" {
  sandbox_id = "sandbox-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sandbox_id` (String) Daytona sandbox ID.

### Optional

- `request_organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `url` (String) Toolbox proxy URL for the sandbox.
